ItacPersonItem.Notes: Studied medicine in Padua in 1608. Cesi advanced his candidacy as member of the Lincei in 1621, for his particular skills as physician, mathematician, and astronomer.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
